title: ProbeOutput
description: Output of the `--probe` flag (predecessor of --probe-deep, kept for backward compat).

status.description: ok = reachable, captcha = anti-bot challenge detected.

http_status.description: HTTP status of the probe response.

usou_chrome.description: v0.9.4 GAP-WS-113: true when probe used chromiumoxide.

tentou_chrome.description: v0.9.4: whether Chrome transport was attempted.

healthy.description: v0.9.4: false when interstitial/CAPTCHA detected in Chrome DOM.
